stack: Rust (axum 0.8 / tokio / cedar-policy 4) + React 19 / Vite / TanStack Query admin UI
summary: Zero external adoption surface. All three goals extend in-tree primitives; no crate or npm candidate scored for adopt/adapt. Build-vs-adopt verdict: BUILD (wire) for all three, zero new dependencies.

build_required.what: Lint the merged (YAML+DB) route set at startup and on hot-reload; startup keeps bail!-under-strict, reload WARNs / rejects-route-and-retains-last-good under strict (never terminates a live process).
reuses: proxy/router.rs:128 — the merged Vec<RouteConfig> already built (currently discarded)
cache/mod.rs:398 rebuild_router_from_db — reload point holding config + db_routes

build_required.what: Store validated sugar_policies as an immutable overlay on AuthzEngine and concatenate DB records ++ sugar in every build/reload path; remove the refuse-start guard. Precedence relies on Cedar forbid-overrides-permit (no custom code).
reuses: authz/bundle.rs:91 CedarBundle::from_records — already merges any &[PolicyRecord] into one PolicySet
authz/engine.rs:229 reload_from_database / cache/mod.rs:372 / admin/mod.rs:727 — reload call sites to concatenate sugar into

build_required.what: New admin endpoint accepting {agent, allow[], deny[]} -> compile_and_validate (same 400-gate) -> persist as the sugar overlay source; Policies-tab builder form. MUST route operator input only through compile_and_validate (no raw-Cedar bypass) — injection defense at the now-attacker-adjacent API boundary.
reuses: authz/sugar.rs:72 compile_agent_tool_policies + the allowlist-charset injection defense
web/src/pages/AgentIdentities.tsx (modal builder + RQ hooks) + web/src/pages/Routes.tsx (nested structured config) — UI templates

authoritative_findings: Cedar Security ref: forbid-overrides-permit (a single forbid=Deny) -> merged-PolicySet precedence is source-agnostic and safe (G2).
Cedar Security ref: skip-on-error + default-deny -> validates lenient parse-before-swap merge on reload (G2).
Cedar Security ref: avoid string concatenation / injection breakout example -> G3 endpoint must preserve the allowlist-charset compile_and_validate gate at the attacker-adjacent API boundary.
